name: Soup Time Cat Creamy Treats Tuna & Chicken 70g
shortDescription: Soup Time Creamy is a healthy, hydrating, and irresistible lickable treat for cats. Made with premium tuna and chicken, it’s packed with essential nutrients to support your cat’s overall well-being. Serve it as a special reward, a quick snack, or a tasty topper to make mealtimes more exciting.
description: Soup Time Creamy is a healthy, hydrating, and irresistible lickable treat for cats. Made with premium tuna and chicken, it’s packed with essential nutrients to support your cat’s overall well-being. Serve it as a special reward, a quick snack, or a tasty topper to make mealtimes more exciting. Ingredients: Tuna, Chicken, Starch, Taurine, Vitamins (A, B2, B3, B5, D3, E), Xanthan Gum Guaranteed Analysis: Crude Protein: 6.5% (min) Crude Fat: 0.1% (min) Crude Fiber: 1.0% (min) Crude Ash: 2.0% (max) Moisture: 90.0% (max) How to Serve: Offer directly from the tube for bonding moments Serve on a dish as a light treat Use as a topper to entice picky eaters
